phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand is outside
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o ponto de táxi aqui fora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see uh-KEE FAW-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis queue immediately outside station gates for quick passenger pickup.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a saída, onde há fila para táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SUHEE-duh, OHNG-dih AH FEE-luh PUH-ruh TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the exit, where there is a taxi queue.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the exit, where there is a taxi queue.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SUHEE-duh, OHNG-dih AH FEE-luh PUH-ruh TAHK-seesh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a saída, onde há fila para táxis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tavira station is known for its historic azulejo panels; the waiting room is in the main hall.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, sala de espera na gare.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh NUH GAH-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, waiting room in the station building.

responses.english: Good morning, waiting room in the station building.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh NUH GAH-rih.
responses.local: Bom dia, sala de espera na gare.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera para passageiros?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka uh SA-la jee-es-PEH-ra [link: de+espera] PA-ra pas-sa-ZHEY-roosh
phrases.cultural_note: Waiting areas are typically adjacent to main service counters for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, localizada ao lado da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, located next to the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, located next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, localizada ao lado da bilheteira.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a passarela subterrânea.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh soob-tih-RAHN-neeuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the underground walkway.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the underground walkway.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh soob-tih-RAHN-neeuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a passarela subterrânea.

phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a plataforma dois do comboio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH DOO koom-BOYOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Underground passages are standard for safe platform access across Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga pela passarela subterrânea.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PEH-luh puh-suh-REH-luh soob-tih-RAHN-neeuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the underground pedestrian crossing.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the underground pedestrian crossing.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PEH-luh puh-suh-REH-luh soob-tih-RAHN-neeuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga pela passarela subterrânea.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the underground pedestrian crossing
phrases.text_local: Como chego à passarela subterrânea da estação?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH puh-suh-REH-luh soob-tih-RAHN-neeuh DUH shtuh-SOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket halls typically serve as the central hub for platform access.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, desça as escadas junto às bilheteiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH bee-lyih-TAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go down the stairs near the ticket counters.

responses.english: Good morning, go down the stairs near the ticket counters.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh UHSH SHKAH-duhsh ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH bee-lyih-TAY-ruhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, desça as escadas junto às bilheteiras.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 2.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is platform 2? Follow the signs to Platform 2.

responses.english: Where is platform 2? Follow the signs to Platform 2.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Plataforma 2.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the tourist information office nearby
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o posto de turismo nas imediações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo NUHSH ee-mih-deeuh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist posts are often located within a short walk from transport hubs.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao chefe de estação ou ao bilheteiro para indicações.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH shtuh-SOWN OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the station master or the ticket clerk for directions.

responses.english: Ask the station master or the ticket clerk for directions.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH shtuh-SOWN OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao chefe de estação ou ao bilheteiro para indicações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand is outside
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a fila de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FEE-luh DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis queue outside the station exit; it is the designated stand.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fila de táxis à saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-luh DIH TAHK-seesh AH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, taxi queue at the exit.

responses.english: Good morning, taxi queue at the exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-luh DIH TAHK-seesh AH SUHEE-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fila de táxis à saída.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi queue is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a fila para os táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-kah eh-zah-TAH-men-chee uh-FI-lah PA-ruh-osh TA-kees? (Liaison: "uh-FI-lah" & "PA-ruh-osh" link smoothly)
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese stations typically direct taxis to a designated curb outside the main gate.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na saída principal à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main exit on the right.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main exit on the right.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na saída principal à direita.
